title: NHS maternity leaders 'arrogant' over staff concerns
description: Baroness Valerie Amos says Oxford University Hospitals felt as if there was an "Oxford way" of doing things.
content:
The chair of a report into maternity services in England has told the BBC that an NHS trust repeatedly failed to listen to concerns about care raised by staff members.

title: Ukrainian charged in Germany over Nord Stream blasts
description: Ukraine denies involvement in the case which may have serious implications for its relationship with Germany.
content:
German prosecutors have filed charges against a Ukrainian national over the blowing up of the Nord Stream pipelines under the Baltic Sea in 2022.

title: Six surprising ways US President Donald Trump made money in 2025
